name: Asparagus with Citrus Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zest from the colored surfaces of an orange and a lime to yield about 1 teaspoon.
2. Cut 1 or 2 thin crosswise slices from the center of an orange and a lime; wrap the slices tightly and refrigerate them. Extract 3 tablespoons juice from the orange and 1 tablespoon juice from the lime.
3. In a bowl, combine the orange and lime zest, orange and lime juice, sour cream, and white pepper to make approximately 1 1/4 cups. Use immediately or cover and chill for up to one day.
4. Bring water to a boil in a 10-12 inch frying pan over high heat. Add asparagus and cook, uncovered, until the stems are just tender when pierced, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Drain asparagus thoroughly, then arrange on a warm serving platter. Garnish with reserved orange and lime slices. Serve with flavored sour cream and salt to taste.
